content: CBS v1.2-beta released. 4 bug fixes + cross-sync alignment. Source and deployed command now converged. Audit: 35 PASS / 0 FAIL / 3 WARN (all acceptable). v1.1 plan and v1.2 iteration plan fully resolved — no more deferred items.

CBS v1.2 released (was v1.2-beta). Key change: removed prompt-type Stop hook for Cross-Sync from CBS skill. Prompt hooks run on Haiku (separate model, no file access) — they are evaluation gates, not action executors. Sync instructions now live in CLAUDE.md. Also: stop-check.sh upgraded to mod-time comparison (was fixed 1-hour window), deployed to all 4 projects. sync-push.sh updated with pending_inbox drain pattern. sync-pull.sh/push.sh use --ff-only (was --rebase). sync-init command also updated. Hooks Mastery skill + research doc added to Skills Factory.
Session closed. Branch: main. Last commit: feat: implement feature-interview + think-through skills.
Session closed. Branch: main. Last commit: chore: CBS v1.2 stable, interview docs reorg, hooks mastery project.
Session closed. Branch: main. Last commit: sync: session state update.
